scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/routes/auth.js && node --check src/routes/customers.js && node --check src/routes/dashboard.js && node --check src/routes/quotes.js && node --check src/routes/invoices.js && node --check src/middleware/auth.js && node --check src/middleware/errorHandler.js && node --check src/middleware/requestContext.js && node --check src/middleware/requestLogger.js && node --check src/middleware/authRateLimit.js && node --check src/middleware/abuseRateLimit.js && node --check src/middleware/metrics.js && node --check src/services/reminderQueue.js && node --check src/services/invoiceWorkflowService.js && node --check src/services/invoiceReminderService.js && node --check src/services/dashboardService.js && node --check src/services/planWorkflowService.js && node --check src/services/quoteWorkflowService.js && node --check src/utils/jwt.js && node --check src/utils/pdf.js && node --check src/utils/documents.js && node --check src/utils/response.js && node --check src/utils/httpErrors.js && node --check src/utils/audit.js && node --check src/utils/plans.js && node --check src/utils/rateLimitStore.js && node --check src/utils/listValidation.js && node --check src/utils/invoiceValidation.js && node --check src/utils/invoiceRepository.js && node --check src/utils/quoteValidation.js && node --check src/utils/quoteRepository.js && node --check src/utils/dashboardValidation.js && node --check src/utils/dashboardMetrics.js && node --check src/utils/dashboardRepository.js && node --check scripts/seed.js && node --check scripts/purgeDemoData.js && node --check scripts/purgeAuditLogs.js && node --check scripts/backupDb.js && node --check scripts/restoreDb.js && node --check scripts/perfBenchmark.js && node --check scripts/drillBackupRestore.js && node --check scripts/smokeApi.js
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules NODE_ENV=test DB_PATH=./test.sqlite JWT_SECRET=test_secret jest --runInBand
scripts.test:watch: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules NODE_ENV=test DB_PATH=./test.sqlite JWT_SECRET=test_secret jest --watch --runInBand
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules NODE_ENV=test DB_PATH=./test.sqlite JWT_SECRET=test_secret jest --coverage --runInBand
scripts.quality:gate: npm run lint && npm run check:syntax && npm run test:coverage
